   160→
   161→<script>
   162→function tap(el){el.classList.toggle('on')}
   163→function onSel(id){}  // selects son autónomos
   164→
   165→const UC=['ac_id', 'dep', 'dst', 'alt1', 'alt2', 'ac_tp', 'eq_c', 'eq_s', 'spd', 'lvl', 'dep_t', 'h_dep', 'remit', 'color_a', 'obs', 'pic', 'dst1', 'dst2', 'id_ex', 'filed', 'ruta', 'd_col'];
   166→UC.forEach(id=>{
   167→  const el=document.getElementById(id);
   168→  if(!el)return;
   169→  el.addEventListener('input',function(){
   170→    const p=this.selectionStart;
   171→    this.value=this.value.toUpperCase();
   172→    try{this.setSelectionRange(p,p)}catch(e){}
   173→  });
   174→});
   175→
   176→function limpiar(){
   177→  if(!confirm('¿Limpiar todos los campos?'))return;
   178→  document.querySelectorAll('.fpl input[type=text]').forEach(el=>el.value='');
   179→  document.querySelectorAll('.fpl textarea').forEach(el=>el.value='');
   180→  document.querySelectorAll('.fpl select').forEach(el=>el.value='');
   181→  document.querySelectorAll('.fpl .sq').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('on'));
   182→}
   183→</script>
